title: I wish there was a lightweight API documentation tool
content: Maintaining API docs manually wastes hours every release.

title: Ask HN: need a better way to automate release notes
content: Our team needs a workflow to generate release notes from commits.

title: Feature request: automate changelog creation
content: Please add an automated changelog tool; manual releases are painful.

title: Feature request: automate changelog creation
